title: Case/Care Management * AIDS/HIV Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Case/Care Management * AIDS/HIV Issues 19 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Deafness Disabilities Issues Hard of Hearing Older Adults Hispanic/Latino Community Immigrants Refugees/Entrants/Asylees Homeless Veterans Veterans Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues BENTON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HIV CASE MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management to individuals living with HIV and AIDS. This program provides expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care appointments, transitional housing and rent payment assistance, disease management education, referrals to resources for basic needs, medical and dental services, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 530 NW 27th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT OUR HOUSE NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSING AND CARE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home support like nursing, therapy, and social work. Helps with health checkups, understanding and taking medicines, and getting support for daily and household tasks. Assists with housing needs, connects people with community resources, and offers counseling and social support. Also teaches life and coping skills and checks home safety. 2727 SE Alder Street Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Individuals diagnosed with HIV Hours: No standard hours Email (971) 346-3851 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT PRISM HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary health care and behavioral health. Offers laboratory and pharmacy services. 2236 SE Belmont Street Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8:30am-5pm, Thursday 9am-5pm Email (503) 445-7699 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management to individuals living with HIV and AIDS. This program provides expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing and rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Monday-Friday 8:00am-5pm Email (541) 322-7155 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING BURNS HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management independent living services to individuals living with HIV. Offers expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care and case management appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing, rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 51 W Washington Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 370-2810 401 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING LA GRANDE HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management independent living services to individuals living with HIV. Offers expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care and case management appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing, rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 2102 Cove Avenue La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 612-4028 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING ONTARIO HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management independent living services to individuals living with HIV. Offers expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care and case management appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing, rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 1021 SW 5th Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 889-3119 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING PENDLETON HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management independent living services to individuals living with HIV. Offers expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care and case management appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing, rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 322 SW 3rd Avenue Pendleton, OR 978012174 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 889-3119 104 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING THE DALLES HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management independent living services to individuals living with HIV. Offers expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care and case management appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing, rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 400 E Scenic Drive The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 276-1037 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE DOUGLAS COUNTY HIV+ CARE COORDINATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Case managers work with HIV-positive clients to develop care plans that support the client's ability to sustain self-care. Care coordination services may include medical and pharmacy case management, respite care, in-home support services, benefits and health insurance advocacy, meals, and emergency financial assistance. Referrals may also be provided for social services, housing, dental, mental health and addictions treatment, employment, and financial planning. 647 W Luellen Drive Suite 3 Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV. Emergency financial assistance is limited to clients below 250% of the federal poverty level. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 342-5088 162 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE JACKSON COUNTY HIV+ CARE COORDINATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Case managers work with HIV-positive clients to develop care plans that support the client's ability to sustain self-care. Care coordination services may include medical and pharmacy case management, respite care, in-home support services, benefits and health insurance advocacy, meals, and emergency financial assistance. Referrals may also be provided for social services, housing, dental, mental health and addictions treatment, employment, and financial planning. 955 Town Center Drive Suite B Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV. Emergency financial assistance is limited to clients below 250% of the federal poverty level. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HIV ALLIANCE HIV ALLIANCE MARION COUNTY HIV+ CARE COORDINATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Case managers work with HIV-positive clients to develop care plans that support the client's ability to sustain self-care. Care coordination services may include medical and pharmacy case management, respite care, in-home support services, benefits and health insurance advocacy, meals, and emergency financial assistance. Referrals may also be provided for social services, housing, dental, mental health and addictions treatment, employment, and financial planning. 3855 Wolverine Street NE Suite 6 Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 342-5088 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential case management to individuals living with HIV and AIDS. This program provides HIV testing, expense assistance for HIV medications, transportation costs to medical care appointments, insurance premium payments, transitional housing and rent payment assistance, dental care, disease management education, referrals to other agencies for basic needs, employment, and substance abuse treatment. 1109 June Street Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 386-1115 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Harm Reduction works to meet people where they are at and to reduce the negative effects of drug use and sexual behaviors. Services offered include: rapid HIV testing, rapid Hepatitis C testing, syringe exchange services, distribution of condoms and first aid supplies, and Naloxone distribution. 255 SW Coast Highway Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Varies, by appointment only Email (541) 265-0404 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH LINN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH ALBANY HIV/AIDS RAPID TESTING AND PREVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential rapid testing for HIV/AIDS, syphilis, and hepatitis C. Offers prevention education and treatment support. Assists with access to HIV medications, transportation to medical appointments, transitional housing, disease management education, and referrals for basic needs, employment, and substance use treatment. 1050 SW 7th Avenue Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 967-3888 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU OHSU PARTNERSHIP PROJECT PARTNERSHIP PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive client-centered HIV case management services. Ensures individuals have access to health insurance and other allied health and support services that assist them in maintaining focus with on-going health and medical care. 2525 SW 1st Avenue Suite 1201 Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV and their family members Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 346-4400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU OHSU PARTNERSHIP PROJECT MINORITY AIDS INITIATIVE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps individuals obtain insurance, access medical and mental health care, substance abuse services, housing, and other services. Offers intensive and culturally appropriate services. 2525 SW 1st Avenue Suite 1201 Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Refugees and immigrants living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 731-9593 Get Directions Visit Website More Details QUEST CENTER FOR INTEGRATIVE HEALTH QUEST CENTER FOR INTEGRATIVE HEALTH CLACKAMAS HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides counseling, support groups, mental health evaluations, and education to people seeking a wellness-focused approach to living and dying. Offers inegrated treatment services including Naturopathic medicine, Chinese medicine and acupuncture for mental health disorders, chemical dependency, cancer and provides case management for HIV/AIDS. 112 Beavercreek Road Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday- Thursday 9am-5pm Email (503) 238-5203 155 Get Directions Visit Website More Details QUEST CENTER FOR INTEGRATIVE HEALTH QUEST CENTER FOR INTEGRATIVE HEALTH MULTNOMAH HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides counseling, support groups, mental health evaluations, and education to people seeking a wellness-focused approach to living and dying. Offers inegrated treatment services including Naturopathic medicine, Chinese medicine and acupuncture for mental health disorders, chemical dependency, cancer and provides case management for HIV/AIDS. 3231 SE 50th Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 238-5203 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BENTON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HIV CASE MANAGEMENT CASCADE AIDS PROJECT NEIGHBORHOOD HOUSING AND CARE PROGRAM CASCADE AIDS PROJECT PRISM HEALTH DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES EASTERN OREGON CENTER FOR INDEPENDENT LIVING HIV COMMUNITY SERVICES HIV ALLIANCE HIV+ CARE COORDINATION HIV ALLIANCE HIV+ CARE COORDINATION HIV ALLIANCE HIV+ CARE COORDINATION HIV ALLIANCE HIV+ CARE COORDINATION HOOD RIVER COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HIV/AIDS CASE MANAGEMENT LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM LINN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HIV/AIDS RAPID TESTING AND PREVENTION OHSU PARTNERSHIP PROJECT QUEST CENTER FOR INTEGRATIVE HEALTH HEALTH SERVICES QUEST CENTER FOR INTEGRATIVE HEALTH HEALTH SERVICES
